items.title: VP escalation: upload timeout needs ETA
items.body: From VP Customer Success: Please provide an ETA today for the CSV upload timeout affecting Acme imports. This appears related to JIRA-421 and INC-7741.

execution.definitionOfDone: ETA reply sent to VP and linked incident/story updated.
process: Confirm ETA from engineering fix path

items.title: Action needed: compliance audit demo prep
items.body: Can you finish audit logs for payment settings before Wednesday's demo and share risks in the manager sync?

execution.definitionOfDone: Risk summary is ready and audit story has a completion plan.

items.title: Customer escalation: API rate limit increase request
items.body: Enterprise customer requests a temporary API rate limit increase before their product launch next week. Customer Success needs confirmation today.

execution.definitionOfDone: Customer receives a confirmed response with approved rate limits and rollout timeline.

items.title: Reminder: production readiness review for onboarding changes
items.body: Growth team requests confirmation that onboarding workflow updates are ready for release this week.

execution.definitionOfDone: Release readiness status is documented and shared with stakeholders.

items.title: Action required: partner API deprecation notice
items.body: External partner requests migration support before the v1 API endpoint is retired next month.

execution.definitionOfDone: Partner receives a migration plan with support milestones.

items.title: Follow-up: notification delivery SLA review
items.body: Leadership requests an update on notification delays affecting premium customers.

execution.definitionOfDone: SLA review findings and mitigation actions are shared.

items.title: Security alert: privileged access review overdue
items.body: Quarterly access review remains incomplete for production environments.

execution.definitionOfDone: Access review is completed and evidence is uploaded for compliance.

items.title: Finance request: invoice discrepancy investigation
items.body: Finance team identified mismatched invoice totals for enterprise customers and needs an update before month-end close.

execution.definitionOfDone: Invoice discrepancies are categorized and next steps are communicated.

items.title: Reminder: search indexing performance update
items.body: Product team requests an update on delayed search indexing before the customer webinar.

execution.definitionOfDone: Search indexing status and expected improvements are shared.

items.title: Action needed: CI pipeline stability review
items.body: Engineering leadership requests a summary of recurring CI failures affecting release velocity.

execution.definitionOfDone: Recurring CI issues are documented with improvement proposals.

items.title: Operations update requested: infrastructure capacity forecast
items.body: Leadership team requests updated infrastructure capacity projections for next quarter planning.

execution.definitionOfDone: Capacity forecast is updated and shared with leadership.

items.title: Executive follow-up: onboarding conversion decline
items.body: VP Growth requests an explanation for the recent decrease in onboarding completion rates before tomorrow's business review.

execution.definitionOfDone: Executive update includes root causes, impact assessment, and mitigation plan.

items.title: Urgent: partner webhook migration confirmation
items.body: Strategic partner requests confirmation that webhook endpoint migration will complete before their launch deadline.

execution.definitionOfDone: Partner receives a confirmed migration schedule and support plan.

items.title: Action required: invoice processing SLA breach
items.body: Finance leadership reports invoice generation delays affecting monthly close activities.

execution.definitionOfDone: Finance team receives an ETA and mitigation plan for invoice delays.

items.title: Reminder: notification provider contract review
items.body: Procurement team requests updated delivery metrics to support notification provider renewal discussions.

execution.definitionOfDone: Provider performance summary is shared with procurement stakeholders.

items.title: Security escalation: secret rotation overdue
items.body: Automated audit detected production credentials that have not been rotated within the required period.

execution.definitionOfDone: All identified credentials are rotated and audit evidence is recorded.

items.title: Product request: search relevance improvement update
items.body: Product leadership needs an update on search quality improvements before the quarterly roadmap review.

execution.definitionOfDone: Search improvement progress and next milestones are communicated.

items.title: Reminder: infrastructure cost optimization review
items.body: Finance requests updated cloud cost reduction initiatives for next quarter budgeting.

execution.definitionOfDone: Cost optimization opportunities are documented and prioritized.

items.title: Action needed: repository ownership gaps
items.body: Engineering managers request a report on repositories without assigned code owners.

execution.definitionOfDone: Repository ownership gaps are identified and shared with engineering managers.

items.title: Customer request: dashboard data freshness clarification
items.body: Enterprise customer requests clarification on expected dashboard refresh intervals after noticing delays.

execution.definitionOfDone: Customer receives documented dashboard refresh expectations and current status.

items.title: Leadership update requested: sprint risk summary
items.body: Engineering leadership requests a consolidated view of blocked work and delivery risks before weekly planning.

execution.definitionOfDone: Leadership receives a prioritized risk summary with mitigation actions.

items.title: Executive request: incident RCA summary needed
items.body: CTO requests a concise root cause analysis for yesterday's API latency incident before the executive operations review.

execution.definitionOfDone: Executive RCA summary is delivered with clear next steps and owners.

items.title: Action required: SSO login failures affecting enterprise users
items.body: Customer Success reports increased login failures for enterprise customers using SSO integrations.

execution.definitionOfDone: Affected customers receive an update and a remediation plan is documented.

items.title: Partner escalation: webhook retry volume increasing
items.body: External partner reports duplicate webhook events causing downstream processing delays.

execution.definitionOfDone: Partner receives a resolution timeline and duplicate events are mitigated.

items.title: Finance escalation: subscription renewal discrepancies
items.body: Finance team detected inconsistencies between renewal transactions and billing records.

execution.definitionOfDone: Discrepancies are categorized and finance receives an investigation summary.

items.title: Reminder: provider failover test results required
items.body: Operations leadership requests the outcome of the latest notification provider failover exercise.

execution.definitionOfDone: Failover results and follow-up actions are shared with stakeholders.

items.title: Compliance reminder: access review evidence due
items.body: Audit team requests final evidence for quarterly production access reviews.

execution.definitionOfDone: Audit evidence is submitted and compliance requirements are satisfied.

items.title: Product follow-up: search latency improvement ETA
items.body: Product managers need an updated timeline for search performance improvements before the customer roadmap webinar.

execution.definitionOfDone: Product team receives a validated ETA and risk assessment.

items.title: Budget planning: cloud spend forecast requested
items.body: Finance leadership requests updated infrastructure cost projections for next quarter budgeting.

execution.definitionOfDone: Cloud spend forecast is reviewed and shared with finance stakeholders.

items.title: Engineering request: code review turnaround metrics
items.body: Engineering managers request updated pull request review metrics before planning discussions.

execution.definitionOfDone: Review metrics are documented with recommendations for improvement.

items.title: Customer inquiry: dashboard refresh interval clarification
items.body: Enterprise account team requests confirmation of expected dashboard refresh times for premium customers.

execution.definitionOfDone: Customer-facing guidance is updated and shared with account teams.

items.title: Urgent: API error rate increase detected
items.body: Monitoring alerts indicate a significant increase in API error rates affecting enterprise customers.

execution.definitionOfDone: Error rates return to baseline and stakeholders receive an incident update.

items.title: Customer request: MFA rollout timeline confirmation
items.body: Enterprise customer requests confirmation of the multi-factor authentication rollout schedule.

execution.definitionOfDone: Customer receives an approved rollout timeline and implementation guidance.

items.title: Partner notification: sandbox environment instability
items.body: Multiple partners report intermittent failures in the integration sandbox environment.

execution.definitionOfDone: Partners receive an incident update and sandbox stability is restored.

items.title: Finance follow-up: tax calculation variance review
items.body: Finance team identified unexpected differences in tax calculations for specific regions.

execution.definitionOfDone: Tax calculation discrepancies are resolved and findings are shared with finance.

items.title: Reminder: notification provider SLA documentation
items.body: Procurement team requires updated provider SLA metrics for contract negotiations.

execution.definitionOfDone: SLA metrics are documented and shared with procurement stakeholders.

items.title: Security alert: anomaly detected in privileged access logs
items.body: Automated monitoring identified unusual access patterns in production systems.

execution.definitionOfDone: Access anomalies are investigated and mitigation actions are documented.

items.title: Product request: search adoption metrics update
items.body: Product leadership requests recent search usage trends before roadmap prioritization.

execution.definitionOfDone: Search adoption metrics are summarized and shared with product leadership.

items.title: Action required: infrastructure capacity threshold update
items.body: Operations leadership requests revised infrastructure thresholds for expected traffic growth.

execution.definitionOfDone: Capacity thresholds are updated and approved by stakeholders.

items.title: Engineering follow-up: developer portal adoption review
items.body: Leadership requests metrics on internal developer portal usage and onboarding effectiveness.

execution.definitionOfDone: Developer portal adoption metrics and recommendations are shared.

items.title: Customer inquiry: analytics export frequency clarification
items.body: Enterprise customer requests details about scheduled analytics export intervals.

execution.definitionOfDone: Customer receives documented export frequency expectations and configuration guidance.

items.title: Executive request: weekly delivery risk update
items.body: Leadership requests a consolidated summary of high-risk deliverables and blocked initiatives before weekly planning.

execution.definitionOfDone: Leadership receives a prioritized risk summary with mitigation actions.

items.title: Customer escalation: account lockout increase
items.body: Support team reports increased account lockouts affecting enterprise users.

execution.definitionOfDone: Root cause is identified and customer communication is completed.

items.title: Partner request: API usage forecast review
items.body: Strategic partner submitted revised API traffic projections requiring capacity validation.

execution.definitionOfDone: Partner receives approved capacity guidance.

items.title: Finance alert: failed invoice exports
items.body: Finance team cannot access scheduled invoice exports for month-end reconciliation.

execution.definitionOfDone: Invoice exports are restored and finance receives an update.

items.title: Reminder: notification cost optimization proposal
items.body: Leadership requests cost-saving opportunities for notification delivery channels.

execution.definitionOfDone: Cost optimization proposal is delivered to leadership.

items.title: Compliance notice: security training completion overdue
items.body: Several engineering teams have not completed mandatory security training.

execution.definitionOfDone: Training completion gaps are identified and reminders are sent.

items.title: Product follow-up: search usage segmentation
items.body: Product managers request search usage metrics segmented by customer tier.

execution.definitionOfDone: Segmented search metrics are shared with product teams.

items.title: Action required: infrastructure incident drill schedule
items.body: Operations leadership requests confirmation of the next disaster recovery exercise.

execution.definitionOfDone: Disaster recovery drill schedule is finalized and communicated.

items.title: Engineering request: documentation search improvements
items.body: Developers report difficulty locating internal documentation.

execution.definitionOfDone: Documentation search improvements are prioritized and shared.

items.title: Customer request: analytics retention policy clarification
items.body: Enterprise customer requests clarification regarding historical analytics retention limits.

execution.definitionOfDone: Customer receives approved retention policy details.
